entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural technologies designed to increase productivity and resilience to climate change

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A semi-arid state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research took place

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INCOME
entities.description: The expected financial return from agricultural activities

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A weather scenario characterized by a deficiency of precipitation

entities.name: NORMAL WEATHER
entities.description: A baseline weather scenario used for comparison

entities.name: MOTAD MODEL
entities.description: An optimization model extended to assess the role of climate-smart technologies in minimizing risk-return trade-offs

entities.name: FARMERS' TRADITIONAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Conventional agricultural methods used by farmers

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISK
entities.description: The deviation of actual agricultural income from the expected income

entities.name: CROP INCOME
entities.description: The income generated from the production of crops

entities.name: FARM PONDS
entities.description: A climate-smart agriculture technology used for water harvesting and risk minimization

entities.name: UNPUDDLED MACHINE TRANSPLANTING
entities.description: A climate-smart agriculture technology for rice cultivation that reduces risk

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major crop mentioned in the context of unpuddled machine transplanting

entities.name: COST OF CULTIVATION
entities.description: The total expenditure incurred in the production of crops

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process and output of growing crops
